title: Ghost Tower
description: Build your tower, Ghost by Ghost! Simply drop the block on top of each other and watch your block tower grow taller and taller. But be careful! If your timing is off, youll send them crashing to the ground, and youll have to start all over again. How high can you go? Will you be able to reach the moon? Challenge yourself and see if you have what it takes to create the tallest tower ever! If you like tower-building games, then you will love Ghost Tower Blocks! This game is perfect for anyone who enjoys testing their skills and seeing how far they can push their limits. So, get ready to build, stack, and have fun with Ghost Tower Block.
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
tags: free html5 games for your website
